summary: Complete frontend testing of G-Digital corporate website - ALL CRITICAL ISSUES RESOLVED, excellent implementation across all 8 pages with perfect navigation, responsive design, and interactive features
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with hero section, solutions bento grid, value proposition, triangle, partners, CTA and footer
Navigation to /contacto works perfectly with proper content loading and clean URL routing
Navigation to /nosotros works and shows complete about page with company info, awards, alliances, values sections
Navigation to /recursos works and shows blog articles, filter buttons, news, observatorio sections
Resource filter buttons toggle article visibility correctly (data-filter-btn with values: all, confianza, contratos, activos, ia)
All solution pages load correctly and show proper content:
- /soluciones/confianza-digital works and shows eIDAS trust services page
- /soluciones/contract-tech works and shows contract lifecycle management page
- /soluciones/activos-digitales works and shows digital assets tokenization page
- /soluciones/legaltech-ia works and shows AI governance and compliance page
Contact form validates required fields correctly (nombre, empresa, email, interes, mensaje)
Contact form shows success message 'Enviado correctamente' on submit with visual feedback
Mobile hamburger menu opens correctly and shows all navigation links
Mobile menu auto-closes when clicking navigation links (previous bug FIXED)
Scroll animations (fade-in elements) trigger properly when scrolling down page
Statistics counter animations work correctly (shows '4' instead of '0', '40,000' for evidencias)
All CTA buttons correctly link to /contacto or /contacto.html as expected
Solutions dropdown menu appears on hover in navigation with all 4 solution links
Clean URL routing works correctly (serve redirects .html to clean URLs like /contacto.html -> /contacto)
Responsive design functions perfectly on mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080) viewports
Professional design implementation with Tailwind CSS styling, proper spacing and layout
Playfair Display and Manrope fonts load and display correctly throughout site
Phosphor icons load and display properly (31+ icons across all pages)
Glassmorphism effects and backdrop blur work correctly in navigation and hero sections
Bento grid layout displays properly in solutions section with hover effects
Color scheme implementation correct (primary #004438, accent #009A77, proper contrast)
All form interactions work smoothly with focus states and validation feedback
Navigation active states work correctly showing current page in nav
Footer links function properly pointing to correct pages
Card hover effects and transitions work smoothly across all sections
Hero section gradients and animated elements display correctly
Triangle of Legitimacy section with proper alignment and visual elements
